commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'mkdir -p ~/workspace/yanxi/stage2 && echo  | base64 -d > ~/workspace/yanxi/stage2/mpijob-perf-uccl.yaml && echo  | base64 -d > ~/workspace/yanxi/stage2/mpijob-perf-nccl.yaml && wc -l ~/workspace/yanxi/stage2/mpijob-perf-*.yaml'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl -n yanxi-validation get mpijob,pods -o wide 2>&1'
